name: Generic Story

actions: ask helper to use execute_windows_command to Open notepad and write hi

Retrieve avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id} and associate each character with a unique avatar ID from the response, saving that info as well.
Create videos for all dialogues at a time using the associated avatar ID.
Check the status of generated dialogue videos using the status API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} for all conv_ids which do not have a status of success.
Create a new story every hour.
flows.sub_goal: To generate and present a new engaging story with accompanying avatar dialogues every hour.

actions: Check if any story is available in memory. Present the dialogues from the selected story with a 10-second interval until the story is completed. Once that story is done, proceed to give the next story using the same process.
flows.sub_goal: To give stories to the user.

goal: You should perform task given by user.
